function.name: record_outcome
function.description: Records the outcome of a recommendation (whether accepted, and the results) to enable future model improvement

set_id.description: UUID of the resulting exercise set

accepted.description: Whether the athlete accepted the recommendation

completed_reps.description: Number of reps completed in the resulting set

resulting_rir_reported.description: Athlete's reported RIR after the resulting set

pain_flag.description: Whether pain was reported in the resulting set
